overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a rainy urban environment. The scene transitions from an open street intersection with neon signage to a covered pedestrian arcade with arched colonnades.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with traffic lights

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for the light to change, then beginning to cross the intersection

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk on the right side of the frame

entered.detail: tall pole with red traffic light illuminated
industrial building with corrugated metal fencing
multi-story building with blue facade and graffiti
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rainy urban intersection at night, with the camera waiting at a crosswalk. Street lamps illuminate the wet asphalt as the traffic light changes from red to green, and the character begins crossing the street. A pedestrian walks along the right sidewalk, and palm trees line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street crossing with neon signage

events.description: silver sedan drives past on the left side of the crosswalk
player character model briefly enters right side of frame

agents.ego_description: continuing across the wide intersection toward the building with the Venice sign

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large colorful neon sign spelling VENICE on building facade
red and white striped entrance awning with light bulbs
arched entrance to covered pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The character continues crossing the open intersection toward a building with a prominent VENICE neon sign. A silver sedan passes by on the left, and the red-striped entrance to an arcade becomes visible. The wet streets reflect the neon lights and street lamps as the character approaches the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with arched colonnade

events.description: enters the covered arcade walkway from the open street
passing yellow fire hydrant and trash bins along the arcade wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade passing columns and storefronts on the left

entered.detail: series of stone arches forming a covered walkway
darkened shop windows along the left wall
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
ornate stone pillars supporting the arcade roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian arcade with arched colonnades, transitioning from the open rain to a sheltered walkway. The arcade features decorative columns, storefront windows on the left, and a red-and-white striped ceiling. The character passes a yellow fire hydrant and trash bins while walking toward the distant end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, open urban intersection into the sheltered confines of a pedestrian arcade. It begins at a crosswalk under the glow of street lamps, where the camera moves forward across wet asphalt as the traffic light turns green and palm trees line the periphery. As the character advances, the scene opens up toward a building featuring a prominent neon Venice sign, with the reflections of city lights shimmering on the pavement as a silver sedan passes by. The camera then shifts from the open rain into a covered walkway, transitioning under a red-and-white striped ceiling supported by arched colonnades. Finally, the movement continues deep into the sheltered corridor, passing storefront windows and a yellow fire hydrant toward the distant end of the arcade.
